scripts.gen:css: esbuild src/cssVariables.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=.gen-css.mjs && node --input-type=module -e "import('./.gen-css.mjs').then(async m=>{const fs=await import('node:fs');fs.writeFileSync('theme.css','/* Generated by @basekit/tokens. Do not edit by hand. */\n'+m.buildThemeStylesheet())})" && rm -f .gen-css.mjs
